/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 50D/CTS:1/SWAPD:11-22-17/PF39012/VF2:150/FOP1: 9 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/CTORD:CHARGES 1, 3, 5, 6 & 7 ARE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO PC1385/15    GDIV ELIGRPT DEFER ENTRY/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTY PLEA/ /CTORD:THEHANG TIME AS TO COUNTS 4 & 8 ARE TO RUN CONSECUTIVELY IF THE DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS & CONDITIONS OF THE DEJ/X:DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT IS ENTERED WITH THE FOLLOWING  CONDITIONS FOR SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION/X:DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE 10 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE SUCCESSFULLY AS WELL AS REMAIN ARREST FREE FOR A PERIOD OF 1 YEAR/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALLATTEND 15 ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSES & PROVIDE WRITTEN PROOF OF SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE WRITTEN PROOF ON LETTERHEAD OFCOMPLETION OF COMMUNITY SERVICE HOURS/CTORD:IF THE DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH THE TERMS & CONDITIONS OF THIS DEJ, THE PEOPLE HAVE AGREED TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEAS ON COUNTS 4 & 8, REINSTATE THE 'NOT GUILTY' PLEAS & DISMISSTHE CHARGES AFTER 1  CALENDAR YEAR  FROM DATE OF ENTRY OF DEJ (11-21-18) FOR COUNTS 4 & 8 ONLY/ARBUCKLE/CTORD:THE FINDING OF GUILT AS TO COUNT 2 SHALL STAND AS IS/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/FNDG/DISM3/CONTD:FOR DEJ PROGRESS REPORT IN DEPT 17/DOP/
